articles.title: In Mount Rushmore speech, Trump veers from U.S. exceptionalism to warnings about communism - NPR
articles.description: President Trump ushered in America's 250th anniversary with a darkly political speech that swerved from the typically apolitical, unifying speeches past presidents have given to mark Independence Day.
articles.content: WASHINGTON President Donald Trump ushered in the 250th anniversary of American independence on Friday with soaring rhetoric about American exceptionalism before veering into a darkly political speech… [+6549 chars]

articles.title: New DNA technology leads to identification of Revolutionary War soldier: "A gift to the whole country" - CBS News
articles.description: The remains of a Revolutionary War soldier were identified as a young man from Maryland just before America's 250th anniversary.

articles.author: Sophia Barnes
articles.title: Masked men with Confederate flags seen chanting, marching, riding Metro in DC - NBC4 Washington
articles.description: Videos show masked men marching and chanting “Reclaim America” in Washington, D.C., on July 4. Some flags appeared to depict the Patriot Front logo.
articles.content:
Masked men, some carrying Confederate flags, were seen marching in Washington, D.C., on the Fourth of July.
Reclaim America, reclaim America, the crowd was heard chanting in a video captured near Un… [+934 chars]
